title: Atrivis 7
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{Otheruses|Atrivis}} {{CelestialBody |image= |name=Atrivis 7 |region=*[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]The placement of the planet here is based on the sharing of the name with the Atrivis system. While neither the Atrivis system or sector is mentioned in ''The Cestus Deception'', the article ''[[Reidi Artom's Expansion Manifesto]]'' establishes that system appellations are based on the name of the central star or planet. *[[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]]The [[:File:MiscellaneousRegions.jpg|Client States and Miscellaneous Regions map]] in ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the portions of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] and [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] that fall in grid square L-5 in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]]. |sector=[[Atrivis sector/Legends|Atrivis sector]] |system=[[Generis system/Legends|Atrivis system]] |coordinates=L-5''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', Appendix places Generis at these coordinates. |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position=7''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class= |diameter= |atmosphere=Breathable by [[Human/Legends|Humans]] |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies=Humans |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|I had parents.''"
"''You lost them.''"
"''A range war on Atrivis-Seven. It was a bad time.|[[Sheeka Tull]] tells [[Jangotat|Alpha-98]] of her parents|}} '''Atrivis 7''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Atrivis sector/Legends|Atrivis sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Populated by [[Human/Legends|Humans]], it experienced some domestic conflicts known as range wars. Atrivis 7 was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Sheeka Tull]], who eventually became a resistance fighter with the guerrilla group [[Desert Wind]] located on [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. ==Description== Atrivis 7 was the seventh [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Generis system/Legends|Atrivis system]], located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Sector/Legends|sector]] of the same [[Atrivis sector/Legends|name]]. Its atmosphere was breathable by [[Human/Legends|Humans]]. ==History== Atrivis 7 was inhabited by [[Human/Legends|Human]] settlers who, during the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], engaged in a range war. During the conflict, [[Sheevis Tull]] and his wife were [[Death/Legends|killed]], leaving their daughters, [[Sheeka Tull]] and [[Sheeka Tull's sister|her sister]], orphans. Both sisters later left the planet; Sheeka moved to [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]] while her sister joined a religious group on [[Devon Four]]. On Ord Cestus, Sheeka fought with the [[Desert Wind]] guerrilla movement that opposed the practices of [[Cestus Cybernetics]]. She met, and conceived a child with, [[Jangotat]], an [[Alpha-class Advanced Recon Commando|Alpha-class]] [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|Advanced Recon Commando]] in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]]. ==Behind the scenes== Atrivis 7 was first mentioned in ''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' by [[Steven Barnes]] ([[2004]]) as the homeworld of one of his characters; however, little supporting information was provided. Given the shared name, this article understands it to be a world within the Atrivis [[Star system/Legends|system]], mentioned in the [[West End Games]] ''[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook]]'' ([[1990]]). In ''The Cestus Deception'', Barnes mentions a "range war" occurring on Atrivis 7, but does not elaborate on the meaning of this term. [[In-universe|Out-of-universe]], [[Wikipedia:Range war|Range Wars]] are "a type of (typically undeclared) conflict that occurs in agrarian or stockrearing societies," commonly in the American West.{{WP|http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Range_war|Range war}} The conflicts on Atrivis 7 are likely intended to parallel these struggles. Another West End Games product, ''[[Gundark's Fantastic Technology: Personal Gear]]'' ([[1997]]), mentions a battle in which [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Homack]] gets shot down "over Atrivis." While this may correspond to Atrivis 7, it has not been identified as such, and, as there may be as many as five other planets named "Atrivis [n]" in the system (One planet is already named [[Generis/Legends|Generis]]), this information has been kept at "[[Atrivis]]." ==Appearances== *''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1stm}} *[[The Cestus Deception (abridged audiobook)|''The Cestus Deception'' abridged audiobook]] {{Mo}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |pt=Atrivis 7 }} [[Category:Generis system locations]] [[Category:Planets in the New Territories]] [[Category:Planets in the Outer Rim Territories]]
